title: Why was the girl in hospital?

meanings.usage: 指治疗和护理病人的机构
指陆地与海洋的交界处
指恶劣的天气现象，通常伴有大风大雨
指海中的大石头或礁石
指海洋、湖泊或河流的岸边
距离单位，1英里约等于1.6公里
指陡峭的山崖或海岸边的岩壁
指付出很大努力去做某事
指发出的光，可用于指引方向
指用言语阐述某事的原因或经过
指在前方或朝向未来的方向
指在脑海中回忆起过去的事情

examples.en: She set out from the coast in a small boat.
examples.zh: 她乘小船从海岸出发了。

examples.en: She was caught in a storm.
Towards evening, the boat struck a rock.
examples.zh: 临近傍晚时，小船撞上了一块礁石。

examples.en: The girl jumped into the sea.
She spent the whole night in the water.
She knew she was near the shore.
examples.zh: 她知道自己靠近海岸了。

phrases.usage: 表示一到达就...（相当于as soon as she arrived）

examples.en: On arriving at the shore, the girl struggled up the cliff.
examples.zh: 一到达海岸，女孩就艰难地向上爬向悬崖。

examples.en: When she woke up a day later, she found herself in hospital.
examples.zh: 当她一天后醒来时，她发现自己在医院里。

examples.en: The girl struggled up the cliff towards the light.
examples.zh: 女孩艰难地向悬崖上的灯光爬去。

examples.en: During that time she covered a distance of eight miles.
examples.zh: 在那段时间里，她游了八英里。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻或某一段时间正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去正在发生的动作，常与when、while等连用

examples.en: One afternoon she set out from the coast.
examples.zh: 一天下午她从海岸出发了。

examples.en: The boat struck a rock and the girl jumped into the sea.
examples.zh: 小船撞上了一块礁石，女孩跳入了海中。

grammar.title: 时间状语从句 (Time Clause with 'before')
grammar.definition: 用before引导的时间状语从句，表示主句动作发生在从句动作之前
grammar.structure: 主句 + before + 从句 / Before + 从句 + 主句
grammar.usage: 用于描述先后发生的两个动作，强调主句动作在从句动作之前

examples.en: Nearly a week passed before the girl was able to explain what had happened.
examples.zh: 将近一周后，女孩才能解释发生了什么事。

examples.en: She found herself in hospital when she woke up a day later.
examples.zh: 当她一天后醒来时，她发现自己在医院里。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去的过去，常与before、when等连用

examples.en: She explained what had happened to her.
examples.zh: 她解释了她所发生的事情。

sentencePatterns.pattern: ...before + 主语 + was able to do something

original.en: Nearly a week passed before the girl was able to explain what had happened.
original.zh: 将近一周后，女孩才能解释发生了什么事。

imitations.en: Three hours passed before I was able to find my way.
imitations.zh: 三个小时后我才能找到路。

imitations.en: A long time passed before he was able to speak again.
imitations.zh: 很长时间后他才能再次说话。

original.en: The girl was swimming when the boat struck a rock.
original.zh: 当小船撞上礁石时，女孩正在游泳。

imitations.en: He was reading when the phone rang.
imitations.zh: 电话响的时候他正在看书。

imitations.en: They were walking along the beach when it started to rain.
imitations.zh: 开始下雨时他们正沿着海滩走。

sentencePatterns.pattern: On + 动词-ing, 主语 + 谓语

original.en: On arriving at the shore, the girl struggled up the cliff.
original.zh: 一到达海岸，女孩就艰难地向上爬向悬崖。

imitations.en: On hearing the news, she started to cry.
imitations.zh: 一听到这个消息，她就哭了起来。

imitations.en: On entering the room, he saw a stranger.
imitations.zh: 一进入房间，他就看到一个陌生人。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + spent + 时间 + in + 动词-ing

original.en: She spent the whole night in the water.

imitations.en: He spent two hours in waiting for the bus.
imitations.zh: 他等了两个小时公交车。

imitations.en: They spent the whole day in exploring the city.
imitations.zh: 他们花了一整天探索这座城市。
